understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece; a level is only won when all goals are covered at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The controlled (selected) piece moves in 3-pixel grid steps via MOVE actions, with x increasing to the right and y downward. Movement can be blocked by walls/bounds or by objects in the destination cell; some adjacent objects are pushable blocks that can be shoved along if there is space. Levels can include multiple selectable pieces; control is switched by CLICKing the exact pixel position of another selectable. The 'movement.*_blocked' style cues are only heuristic hints—actual movement success depends on the true collision/push rules, and CLICK has no movement effect beyond potentially changing which piece is selected.
